children.text: Setup the entire level by updating the Z height and Z elevation of most environment objects. They're basically flat in the editor to make them easier to see and work with while doing level design.
Lamp posts need to be manually generated, since they're composed of multiple 3D shapes. Each lamp post requires a pole and two types of lights.
Restart the layout for debugging purposes.
If the current layout name has level, set the variable current level to the number it contains
